mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USER) as totMember, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USER WHERE created_at > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) as newMember, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAINER) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM GYM) as totPartners, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(payment_price), 0) FROM PAYMENT WHERE status = '결제완료' AND payment_date > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) as salesAmount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAINER WHERE approval_status = 'PENDING') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM GYM WHERE approval_status = 'PENDING') as authWaitCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT WHERE status = 'WAIT') as reportWaitCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INQUIRY WHERE status = 'WAIT') as inquiryWaitCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SETTLEMENT WHERE status = '정산대기') as settleWaitCount
